name: Haircut & Style
description: Precision cuts shaped to your face and lifestyle. Includes consultation, wash, cut, and finish.

name: Beard Trim & Shape
description: Clean lines, sharp edges, and a sculpted finish. Your beard deserves the same attention as your hair.

name: Hair & Beard Combo
description: The full treatment — precision haircut paired with a beard trim for a complete, polished look.

name: Hot Towel Shave
description: The classic barbershop ritual. Hot towel, premium lather, straight razor — the closest shave possible.

name: Hair Color & Highlights
description: From subtle enhancements to bold transformations. Ammonia-free products, applied by color specialists.

name: Scalp Treatment
description: Deep conditioning and scalp massage to restore health, reduce dryness, and boost growth.
